name: Group Ten Metals Inc.
summary: Group Ten Metals Inc., a mineral exploration company, engages in the acquisition, exploration, and development of mineral properties in Canada and the United States. The company explores for gold, platinum, palladium, nickel, copper, cobalt, and other commodities. Its core asset is the 100%-owned flagship Stillwater West platinum group element-nickel-copper-cobalt and gold project located in Stillwater District, Montana. The company also holds the Black Lake-Drayton Gold project in northwest Ontario, and the Kluane PGE-Ni-Cu-Co project located in Yukon Territory in Canada. In addition, it owns 100% interest in the Duke Island Copper-Nickel-PGE Project located in Alaska. The company was formerly known as Duncastle Gold Corp. and changed its name to Group Ten Metals Inc. in February 2015. Group Ten Metals Inc. was incorporated in 2006 and is headquartered in Vancouver, Canada.
